'''Hurcha''' was the eighth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from the single [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Churba system]]. Because of its [[Temperature/Legends|cold]] climate and distance from the sun, it was regarded as having no civilized purpose.<ref name="DFRS" />
